article_title: B.C. Reg. 242/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Railway and Pipeline Property Tax Values Updated for 2026 in British Columbia
briefs.summary: BC has updated the per-kilometre dollar values used to assess (calculate the taxable value of) railway tracks and pipelines for 2026, and replaced the pipeline size schedules used in that calculation.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 242/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
